summary: Completed testing of Luna Group VIP Send Gift Card API and QR Scanner features. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI has rendering issues on web - 'Send Gift Card to a Friend' section and 'Scan Member QR Code' button are NOT visible on web preview, though code exists in the components.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Scan Member QR Code' button (line 165-172) is NOT rendering on web. The TouchableOpacity with data-testid='staff-scan-qr-btn' is not visible in the DOM.
ui_bugs.note: Likely caused by expo-barcode-scanner import affecting web rendering. The BarCodeScanner.requestPermissionsAsync() in useEffect may be causing issues on web.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Send Gift Card to a Friend' section (line 461-526) is NOT rendering on web. The View with data-testid='send-gift-section' is not visible in the DOM.
ui_bugs.note: The section should appear below the gift cards section but is not rendering on web preview.

action_items: Fix Staff Portal 'Scan Member QR Code' button not rendering on web - consider wrapping BarCodeScanner import with Platform.OS check or lazy loading
Fix Rewards Shop 'Send Gift Card to a Friend' section not rendering on web - investigate why the View is not appearing in DOM
Consider adding Platform.OS === 'web' check to hide QR scanner button on web since camera won't work anyway
critical_code_review_comments: expo-barcode-scanner may not be fully compatible with web - the import and useEffect calling BarCodeScanner.requestPermissionsAsync() could be causing the component to fail silently
The 'Send Gift Card to a Friend' section code exists but is not rendering - possible React Native Web rendering issue with the View/TouchableOpacity components

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Main UI renders but new sections not visible on web

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for Send Gift Card feature are fully working. Frontend has rendering issues on web - the new UI sections (Send Gift Card, QR Scanner button) are not visible. The code exists in the components but is not rendering to DOM on web preview. This may work correctly on native mobile but needs investigation for web.

mocked_apis.Stripe payments: Test keys (sk_test_emergent) - checkout sessions created but payment won't complete
mocked_apis.CherryHub CRM: MOCKED - Blocked by auth scopes (403 error)

send_gift_card_api.details: POST /api/payments/gift-card/send creates Stripe checkout, gift code (LUNA-GIFT-XXXXXXXX), share URL, detects existing members

gift_card_redeem_info_api.details: GET /api/payments/gift-card/redeem/{gift_code} returns gift card info (public endpoint)

gift_card_claim_api.details: POST /api/payments/gift-card/claim/{gift_code} requires auth, validates payment status before claiming

existing_member_detection.details: Send gift card correctly returns is_existing_member: true for existing Luna members, false for new users

staff_portal_member_profile_api.details: GET /api/perks/member/{user_id}/profile returns tier benefits and today activity

rewards_shop_ui_gift_cards.details: Gift cards section renders with $25, $50, $100, $150 options and 10% bonus display

rewards_shop_ui_send_gift.details: 'Send Gift Card to a Friend' section NOT visible on web - code exists but not rendering

staff_portal_ui_qr_scanner.details: 'Scan Member QR Code' button NOT visible on web - code exists but not rendering

staff_portal_ui_search.details: Search bar renders correctly, requires authentication to search

previous_features.details: Gift card checkout, wallet balance, packages endpoint all still working

api_verification./api/payments/gift-card/send: PASS - Creates Stripe checkout, gift code, share URL
